response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content and identified the performer as Mori Calliope. 2. Reviewed the entire video audio and confirmed that it consists entirely of a spoken-word monologue. 3. Confirmed no vocal music or song performances occur within the video. 4. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to 'false' for all scenes.
response.global_summary: A video of VTuber Mori Calliope speaking to her audience about her latest album and sharing personal updates.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope speaks directly to the camera about her recent performance and her family's reaction to her new album.
A transition to a 'jidori' (selfie) camera view where Mori Calliope shows off her 3D model, focusing on the skirt and other details.
The camera transitions back to the main stage view, and Mori Calliope concludes her update by thanking her staff and audience.
